title: agropyron vulpinum
intro: Agropyron vulpinum, also known as coyote wheat or coyote's wheat grass, is a species of grass that belongs to the family Poaceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its various medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Agropyron vulpinum include reducing inflammation, improving digestive health, and supporting immune function. The plant can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture for its herbal preparations, and is often used in combination with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties.
